ab: ’nyal sinsi la.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: laxi h_yapas la, nhay usa’ tama’ sa thekan su’.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: swali’ saku’, nyux saku’ mqsuqi’ la!
en: Sorry, I’m late!

ab: nhay kzyup te qsahuy!
en: Come in quickly.

ab: soni’ ga te pira’ ryax nqu rehay la?
en: What day is it today?

ab: te zmagal ryax na babaw rehay, phangaw ta’ suxan, hala ta’ hm_yapas te tanux ma’?
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧?
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: aw ga! hata’ hm_yapas syaw gong.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.

ab: suxan ga te pira’ ryax na babaw rehay la?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: suxan ga te cyugal ryax na babaw rehay, hata’ mzyuy mari babaw kinryax suxan!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: nanu’ pcyuwagun su’ sasan suxan?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: suxan ga hngawan ryax, sami ki yaya’ mu ga musa’ sami kyokay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: nyux su’ hmswa’ la?
en: What’s wrong?

ab: nyux saku’ aki’ mkmutaq, musa’ saku’ psqcyan.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: nyux mtkgil iyal qu tunux mu.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: psromux hngaw ha’.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, nyux mxal ktu’ maku’, musa’ saku’ psqcyan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: aw, nhay usa’.
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: haku’ mima’ qba’ hma’?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: sobih ta’ ptmasuq mqbaq la, lawa’ cikay ru usa’.la.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, nyux mxal balay tunux maku’, aki’ saku’ mhngaw babaw kinryax.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: aw, inblaq musa’ ngasal ki.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, phngaw saku’ te qutux ryax na rehay ’nyal, mosa’ saku’ pkita’ sinsi phgup.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: aw, inblaq mlahang hi’ su’.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: cyux inu’ Binay?
en: Where is Binay?

ab: cyux mxal ktu’ nya’, cyux sa psqcyan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.

ab: cyux inu’ Silan?
en: Where is Silan?

ab: sinsi, cyux mxal btakan nya’, phngaw kira’.
ch: B:老師，他喉嚨痛，今天請假。
en: Teacher, he has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: swa’ ini’ ’wah qu Binay?
en: Why didn’t Binay come?

ab: cyux mkilux lozi qu tunux nya’.
en: She has a fever.
